## Gate Checklist

- [ ] Static gate reviewed: frontmatter, description, manifest, changelog, references, scripts, and public-safety hygiene.
- [ ] Behavior gate reviewed: trigger, non-trigger, ambiguous, conflict, and safety/deprecation fixtures where applicable.
- [ ] Runtime gate reviewed: tested runtimes, permission/settings needs, hooks, and adapter determinism.
- [ ] Regression gate reviewed: adjacent skills, deprecated versions, public examples, and benchmark coverage.

See `docs/review-gates/agentic-skill.md` for the full gate.
